product_overview: Sistema Lucas is a clinical management platform for patients, professionals, and administrators. It supports secure account access, appointment workflows, professional scheduling, and management of patient documents and clinical records.
core_goals: Allow patients to create accounts, verify email, and recover access to their accounts
Allow users to authenticate and access role-specific areas of the system
Allow administrators to manage professionals, patients, and appointments
Allow patients to view, cancel, and reschedule their appointments
Allow professionals to manage availability, appointments, profile data, documents, and clinical notes
Allow patients to view their uploaded exam documents and export their data

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Enables users to sign in with email and password and access the appropriate dashboard area.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit the login form -> See an error message

features.name: Patient Registration and Email Verification
features.description: Allows a new patient to create an account and complete email verification after registration.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Enter personal and contact details -> Submit the registration form -> See a success message and be redirected to /verify-email
Navigate to /verify-email with a verification token -> View the verification result -> See a success message or an error message based on the token

features.name: Password Recovery
features.description: Lets users request a password reset link and set a new password using the reset flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /forgot-password -> Enter email -> Submit the reset request form -> See a confirmation message
Navigate to /reset-password with a reset token -> Enter a new password -> Confirm the new password -> Submit the form -> See a success message and be redirected to /login

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Shows administrators system statistics and operational indicators.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/dashboard -> View appointment counts and patient counts -> Review the displayed system statistics

features.name: Professionals Management
features.description: Lets administrators view, create, edit, delete, and export professional accounts.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/professionals -> View the list of professionals -> Add a new professional by entering the required details -> Save the new professional
Navigate to /panel/professionals -> View the list of professionals -> Select an existing professional for editing -> Update the professional data -> Save the changes
Navigate to /panel/professionals -> View the list of professionals -> Remove a professional from the system
Navigate to /panel/professionals -> View the list of professionals -> Export the professionals list as a CSV file

features.name: Patients Management
features.description: Lets administrators view, unblock, delete, and export patient accounts.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/patients -> View the list of patients -> Unblock a blocked patient account
Navigate to /panel/patients -> View the list of patients -> Remove a patient from the system
Navigate to /panel/patients -> View the list of patients -> Export the patients list as a CSV file

features.name: Appointments Management for Admin
features.description: Lets administrators view all appointments and create or delete appointments on behalf of the clinic.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/appointments -> View the list of all appointments -> Create a new appointment by selecting a professional, a patient, and a date and time -> Save the appointment
Navigate to /panel/appointments -> View the list of all appointments -> Remove an appointment from the system

features.name: My Appointments
features.description: Lets patients review their own appointments and take action on upcoming bookings.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/my-appointments -> View the list of personal appointments -> Cancel an appointment by providing a justification
Navigate to /panel/my-appointments -> View the list of personal appointments -> Reschedule an appointment by selecting a new date and time and providing a justification
Navigate to /panel/my-appointments -> View the list of personal appointments -> Export the appointment list as a CSV file

features.name: Professional Appointments
features.description: Lets professionals review their schedule and update appointment attendance status.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/professional-appointments -> View today's appointments -> Confirm an appointment
Navigate to /panel/professional-appointments -> View all appointments -> Mark a patient as absent

features.name: My Availability
features.description: Allows professionals to set their monthly availability for appointment scheduling.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/my-availability -> Select a month -> Toggle available time slots on the calendar grid -> Save the monthly availability

features.name: My Documents
features.description: Lets patients review and download their uploaded exam documents.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/my-documents -> View the list of uploaded exam documents -> Download a document

features.name: Document Management
features.description: Allows professionals to view, upload, and delete patient exam documents.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/document-management -> View the list of documents -> Upload a new document for a patient -> Review the updated document list
Navigate to /panel/document-management -> View the list of documents -> Delete a document

features.name: My Profile
features.description: Allows professionals to review and update their own profile information.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/my-profile -> View the current profile information -> Edit name, specialty, or CRM details -> Save the updated profile

features.name: Medical Record Entry
features.description: Lets professionals enter clinical notes for a specific patient appointment.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/medical-record/:id -> Enter clinical notes -> Save the medical record

features.name: Data Export
features.description: Allows authorized users to download relevant system data as CSV files.
user_flows: Navigate to /panel/dashboard -> Export the available data set as a CSV file
Navigate to /panel/professionals -> Export the professionals data as a CSV file
Navigate to /panel/patients -> Export the patients data as a CSV file
Navigate to /panel/my-appointments -> Export the personal appointment data as a CSV file

routes.description: Request a password reset link via email
Set a new password using a reset token
Admin view and management of all appointments
Patient view of their own appointments with cancel/reschedule
Professional view of today's and all their appointments
Professional manages their monthly availability slots
Patient view of their uploaded exam documents
Professional/admin upload and management of patient documents
Professional updates their own profile information
Professional records clinical notes for a patient appointment

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email and password; stores JWT token
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Patient Registration
features.description: New patient self-registers with personal and contact details
user_interactions: Fill name, email, password, CPF, phone, date of birth fields
See success message and redirect to verify-email

features.name: Email Verification
features.description: Verifies patient email using token from registration email link
user_interactions: Land on page via email link with token query parameter
See success or error verification message

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Patient/professional requests password reset link by email

features.name: Reset Password
features.description: Set a new password using reset token received via email
user_interactions: Fill new password and confirm password fields
See success message and redirect to login

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Displays system statistics and KPIs for admin users
user_interactions: View appointment counts, patient counts, and other statistics

features.name: Professionals Management
features.description: Admin lists, creates, edits, and deletes professional accounts
user_interactions: Click Add Professional button and fill form
Click Edit on a professional and update data
Click Delete on a professional to remove them

features.name: Patients Management
features.description: Admin lists, manages, blocks and unblocks patient accounts
user_interactions: Click Unblock on a blocked patient
Click Delete on a patient to remove them

features.name: Appointments Booking (Admin)
features.description: Admin views all appointments and can create or delete them
user_interactions: Click New Appointment and select professional, patient, date/time
Click Delete to remove an appointment

features.name: My Appointments (Patient)
features.description: Patient views their own appointments and can cancel or reschedule
user_interactions: Click Cancel on an appointment and provide justification
Click Reschedule and select new date/time with justification

features.name: Professional Appointments
features.description: Professional views today's and all their appointments; confirms or marks absences
user_interactions: Click Mark Absence on a patient

features.name: My Availability (Professional)
features.description: Professional sets their monthly availability slots for appointments
user_interactions: Toggle available time slots on the calendar grid

features.name: My Documents (Patient)
features.description: Patient views their uploaded exam documents
user_interactions: View list of uploaded exam documents

features.name: Document Management (Professional)
features.description: Professional uploads and manages patient exam documents
user_interactions: Upload a new document for a patient

features.name: My Profile (Professional)
features.description: Professional views and updates their own profile data
user_interactions: Edit fields such as name, specialty, CRM

features.name: Medical Record
features.description: Professional records clinical notes for a specific patient appointment
user_interactions: Click Save to submit the medical record

features.name: Data Export
features.description: Admin, professional, and patient can download data as CSV
user_interactions: Click export button for the relevant data set

known_limitations.issue: Document Management page has no HTTP calls wired to backend; operations appear UI-only
known_limitations.impact: Upload/delete actions may not persist to the backend

known_limitations.issue: My Documents service uses hardcoded localhost:8081 instead of environment.apiUrl
known_limitations.impact: Will break in production or non-local environments
